rows.label: qev041904_MSG0001
rows.name:
Why did he have to borrow money from that guy at a time like this...
He really always has the worst timing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041904_MSG0002
rows.name: The Nopopotamus seems to have been killed by someone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041904_MSG0003
rows.name:
I do not know if it was those Growth guys or what, but...
The wedding ring must have been stolen by them as well, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041904_MSG0004
rows.name: The Nopopotamus with the ring tied to its teeth was killed by someone, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041904_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we could just find that culprit, the ring might be returned, but...
That sounds even more difficult than tricking Jalolo, mo.[ST:wait ]
